adjusted.reasoning: Anchor to market (GER ~70%). Germany won Group E and have the attack to break down a Paraguay side that scraped through as a best third and is now missing suspended midfielder Diego Gomez (Almiron returns). Knockout caution keeps it short of the model's blowout read.

factors.factor: Germany -280; Paraguay 3rd-place qualifier, D.Gomez suspended, Almiron back
